emails.subject: Renewable Energy folder on O-drive
emails.body: Renewable Energy folder on O-drive All You should all now have access to a shared folder in the O drive. Together with the internal competitive analysis web site we are developing, we can use this to keep files we all need access to. Check it out O:\StateGovAffairs\Renewables Let me know if you have any problems accessing this. Jenny

emails.subject: RE: Renewable Energy folder on O-drive
emails.body: RE: Renewable Energy folder on O-drive Jenny, We have a main Renewable Power Desk folder on the O Drive (O:Portland/WestDesk/Renewable Power Desk). Since we all have access to the O Drive, I would prefer to store all of our info there. I have created a new folder called Shared in which we can store our Competitive Analysis and other files. Howe does that sound? Elliot To: Mainzer, Elliot; Ring, Richard; Bolton, Stacey; Bryson, Jesse; Shields, Jeff; Oh, Jeffrey

emails.subject: RE: Renewable Energy folder on O-drive
emails.body: Elliot: Sorry, I guess Stacey and I weren't aware of it. I don't have access to your site (I had to fill out an e-request for all of us to get access to the GovAffairs site). I will request access to the West O-drive site for myself then. Jenny To: Thome, Jennifer; Ring, Richard; Bolton, Stacey; Bryson, Jesse; Shields, Jeff; Oh, Jeffrey
